name: Bell + activity feed reflect a customer inquiry within ~30s of the event
description: After a customer submits an inquiry on the public quote, the contractor's notification bell unread count increments; the dashboard 'What we handled today' panel surfaces a new entry. Verifies the event → notification mapping and the dashboard's polling/SSE refresh cadence.

persona.name: Diego
persona.context: Has the dashboard open in a tab; checks it when he gets a moment.

preconditions: An inquiry was posted to one of his quotes ~10s ago

steps.expect: Activity feed entry: pink msg icon, 'Asha Patel asked a question' (title) + 'Can we start next week?' (body), 'just now' time

steps.action: Clicks the bell icon in the topbar
steps.expect: Notifications drawer (when wired) lists the same inquiry; unread count was 1 before click, drops to 0 on mark-read
Routes to /quotes/{id} (or back to the public quote preview); the inquiry context is visible somewhere — a sidebar entry / drawer / inline card

evaluationCriteria.check: Inquiry uses the customer_replied skin (msg icon, coffee-50 bg) so it's visually distinct from quote_sent / quote_accepted entries
Latency from inquiry submission to bell increment ≤ poll interval; the contractor sees customer signal quickly
Notification is scoped to the contractor's userId only — other tenants never see it. entityType=quote so the deep-link works.
Bell shows aria-label with the unread count; activity entry is a button with descriptive aria-label
